title: senecio ochrocarpus
intro: Senecio ochrocarpus, also known as Yellow Bitterweed, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its bitter and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including anti-cancer and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for certain diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
